<p class="key-answer" data-question="Ferric Maltol 有什麼相關新聞？">
<strong>Ferric Maltol</strong> 目前有 <strong>11 則</strong>相關新聞報導，預測適應症 20 個。
</p>

<div class="key-takeaway">
本頁整合 Ferric Maltol 的 AI 預測適應症與最新健康新聞，橘色標示的適應症表示近期有相關新聞報導。
</div>

<div class="drug-info-card">
<strong>藥物資訊</strong>
<ul>
<li><strong>原適應症</strong>：Feraccru is indicated in adults for the treatment of iron deficiency.</li>
<li><strong>證據等級</strong>：L1</li>
<li><strong>預測適應症</strong>（20 個）：<ul>
<li>iron deficiency anemia（100.0%）</li>
<li>deficiency anemia（100.0%）</li>
<li>Plummer-Vinson syndrome（100.0%）</li>
<li>vitamin B12- and folate-independent constitutional megaloblastic anemia（100.0%）</li>
<li>microcytic anemia（99.9%）</li>
<li>IRIDA syndrome（99.3%）</li>
<li>biotin metabolic disease（98.2%）</li>
<li>severe nonproliferative diabetic retinopathy（98.1%）</li>
<li>ariboflavinosis（97.7%）</li>
<li>Keshan disease（97.2%）</li>
<li>non-syndromic esophageal malformation（97.2%）</li>
<li>folic acid deficiency anemia（97.2%）</li>
<li>protein-energy malnutrition（97.2%）</li>
<li>choline deficiency disease（97.1%）</li>
<li>swayback（97.1%）</li>
<li>potassium deficiency（97.1%）</li>
<li>magnesium deficiency（97.1%）</li>
<li>steatitis（97.0%）</li>
<li>vitamin deficiency disorder（96.9%）</li>
<li>hypochromic anemia（96.8%）</li>
</ul></li>
</ul>
<p><a href="{{ '/drugs/ferric-maltol/' | relative_url }}">查看完整藥物報告 →</a></p>
</div>
